title: Mediterranean Feta Cheese Skewers
description: A savory and adventurous Mediterranean dish featuring cubed feta cheese in a miso marinade, perfect for a wine and cheese night. This vegetarian-friendly dish is full of flavor and sure to impress.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together miso paste, red wine, olive oil, garlic, oregano, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Add the cubed feta cheese to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated feta cheese onto the wooden skewers.
Grill the skewers for 2-3 minutes per side, or until the cheese is slightly charred.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional oregano if desired.
Let the skewers cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve with a side of crackers or bread for a wine and cheese night.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
